# On Fate

*Cicero · 44 BCE*

A short treatise in which Cicero examines the problem of [fate](../glossary/determinism.md) and responsibility, reporting in particular the [compatibilist](../glossary/compatibilism.md) position of the Stoic Chrysippus and his famous image of the cylinder. It is a key source on the ancient debate between necessity and freedom.
